# Marketing Projects

## Campus Product Launch & Sales Campaign

### Overview
This project involved working with a group to create a product designed to help students on campus. After developing the product idea, our team brought it to school and sold it directly to students in front of the classroom.

### Objective
The goal was to apply marketing concepts in a real selling environment by identifying student needs, presenting the product, and interacting with potential customers.

### Target Audience
Our target audience was college students who could benefit from a useful and convenient campus product.

### My Role
- Helped develop the product idea
- Participated in planning the sales approach
- Communicated with student customers
- Observed customer reactions and feedback

### Marketing Strategy
Our strategy focused on direct selling and face-to-face communication. We explained the product’s value, answered questions, and adjusted our approach based on how students responded.

### What I Learned
This project helped me understand how important audience insights, product positioning, and communication are in marketing. It also showed me how customer feedback can influence marketing decisions in real time.

---

## Social Media Engagement Analysis

### Overview
This project focuses on analyzing social media engagement to understand what type of content performs best.

### Objective
- Analyze engagement metrics (likes, comments, shares)
- Identify high-performing content
- Suggest improvements for future posts

### Tools
- Excel / Google Sheets

### Insights
- Posts with visuals tend to perform better
- Engagement increases when content is relatable to students
- Timing of posts affects performance

### Takeaway
This project strengthened my ability to interpret data and apply insights to improve marketing strategies.
